title: tephrosia diversifolia
intro: Tephrosia diversifolia, also known as the Panga Panga or Horsefly Tree, is a plant species native to Africa and Asia, characterized by its compound leaves and small, white flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Tephrosia diversifolia include its potential to reduce fever, treat skin conditions, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant is often used in traditional medicine to make herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat a range of ailments.
